rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Assign statements in implementation contracts must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: AGREE guarantee expressions must have valid types; resolve type errors by fixing root references or removing invalid clauses
Component type contracts should not reference subcomponent ports directly without proper variable representation
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions
Ensure binary expressions in AGREE have matching left and right side types
anti_patterns: Do not place assume statements in implementation-level component scopes
Do not reference unresolved identifiers in guarantee expressions
